---
title: "Tarea 1 acciones Rstudio continuacion"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.





```{r}
library(quantmod)
```

```{r}
getSymbols("WMT", from = "2019-11-29" )
```



```{r}
getSymbols("MSFT", from = "2019-11-29" )
```



```{r}
getSymbols("NVDA", from = "2019-11-29" )
```





```{r}
getSymbols("V", from = "2019-11-29" )
```




```{r}
getSymbols("JPM", from = "2019-11-29" )
```





```{r}
wmt_cierre <- (WMT$WMT.Close)
```



```{r}
wmt_apertura <- (WMT$WMT.Open)
```



```{r}
wmt_maximo <- (WMT$WMT.High)
```



```{r}
msft_cierre <- (MSFT$MSFT.Close)
```



```{r}
msft_apertura <- (MSFT$MSFT.Open)
```



```{r}
msft_maximo <- (MSFT$MSFT.High)
```



```{r}
nvda_cierre <- (NVDA$NVDA.Close)
```



```{r}
nvda_apertura <- (NVDA$NVDA.Open)
```




```{r}
nvda_maximo <- (NVDA$NVDA.High)
```




```{r}
v_cierre <- (V$V.Close)
```



```{r}
v_apertura <- (V$V.Open)
```




```{r}
v_maximo <- (V$V.High)
```





```{r}
jpm_cierre <- (JPM$JPM.Close)
```






```{r}
jpm_apertura <- (JPM$JPM.Open)
```






```{r}
jpm_maximo <- (JPM$JPM.High)
```






```{r}
wmt_cierre <- na.omit(wmt_cierre)
```




```{r}
wmt_apertura <- na.omit(wmt_apertura)
```





```{r}
wmt_maximo <- na.omit(wmt_maximo)
```




```{r}
msft_cierre <- na.omit(msft_cierre)
```





```{r}
msft_apertura <- na.omit(msft_apertura)
```




```{r}
msft_maximo <- na.omit(msft_maximo)
```





```{r}
nvda_cierre <- na.omit(nvda_cierre)
```





```{r}
nvda_apertura <- na.omit(nvda_apertura)
```





```{r}
nvda_maximo <- na.omit(nvda_maximo)
```





```{r}
v_cierre <- na.omit(v_cierre)
```





```{r}
v_apertura <- na.omit(v_apertura)
```





```{r}
v_maximo <- na.omit(v_maximo)
```





```{r}
jpm_cierre <- na.omit(jpm_cierre)
```





```{r}
jpm_apertura <- na.omit(jpm_apertura)
```





```{r}
jpm_maximo <- na.omit(jpm_maximo)
```
